Fill in ALL FOUR sections. This template is the single biggest determinant of a
one-pass build — be concrete. The `@claude` line at the bottom starts the build
when you file the issue; delete it if you want to save a draft first and tag
@claude in a comment later.
-->

## 1. Deliverable
<!-- One paragraph: what exists when this is done. -->

## 2. Acceptance criteria
<!-- Concrete, testable statements — how we'll know it's done. -->
- A user can …
- The page/endpoint shows …

## 3. Out of scope
<!-- What NOT to build. -->
- …

## 4. Context
<!-- Links to related files, issues, or docs. Optional. -->

@claude please build this per the acceptance criteria above.
